candidate_queue.add_card: Birgi, God of Storytelling // Harnfel, Horn of Bounty

generic_staple_policy.reason: fast mana is valuable, but 607 has no safe cut and prior evidence blocks retest.
generic draw is valuable, but it must prove it helps Lorehold's miracle/topdeck floor.

next_actions: mine named same-lane cuts for topdeck and mana rows first
keep Mana Vault and The One Ring as learning-only until new trace and cut proof exist
decision.reason: The queue has learning rows, but no current row has the named same-lane cut and floor proof required by the structure matrix.

mana_foundation.interpretation: The 607 mana plan is not just more fast mana: it combines 34 lands, fetch/dual fixing, artifact ramp, spell ramp, and opponent-turn mana rocks that feed miracle windows.
